---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea to improve the app
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## What would you like to happen?
Describe the feature or improvement you would like to see.

Example:
"I'd like to be able to save multiple ingredients at once."

## Why would this be useful?
Tell us what problem this would solve or how it would help you.

Example:
"This way it would be easier to add complete recipes."

## How do you imagine it working?
Describe how you think this could work in the app.

Example:
"I could select several ingredients and save them under the same recipe name."

## Have you seen this somewhere else?
If another app or website does something similar, you can share it here.

## Additional context
Add anything else that might help explain your idea.
You can also include screenshots, sketches, or examples.
